title: rhododendron selense subsp. duseimatum
intro: Rhododendron selense subsp. duseimatum, a lesser-known species of rhododendron, is a flowering plant that belongs to the heath family, Ericaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its potential medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Rhododendron selense subsp. duseimatum are believed to include treating various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin disorders, as well as possessing antioxidant and antiviral properties. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve making infusions or decoctions from its leaves or roots, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human use.
